allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const keys = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('resend'\) || k.includes\('react-email'\) || k.includes\('@react-email'\) || k.includes\('email'\)\); console.log\(keys.length ? keys : 'nenhum email dep'\)")
